name: The Nightclub's Underground
description:
Down in the nightclub’s underground, you find everything you crave on a sweaty party night—and more than you’d ever admit out loud.

There are guys who came to breed and guys who came to be used.

Guys on their knees, working every cock they can get their lips on.

Pups who wag at the sound of boots. Handlers who watch you like they already own you.

And some… just stand in the corner, hard, flushed, still deciding if they’re ready to let go.

No one here talks about it. No one needs to.

You follow the scent, the rhythm, the glances—and you end up exactly where you belong.
creator: Bealaro
